name: Rafael Holdings, Inc.
business: Rafael Holdings, Inc. is a biotechnology company that develops pharmaceuticals and holds interests in clinical and early-stage companies that develop pharmaceuticals and medical devices. Its lead candidate is Trappsol Cyclo, being evaluated for Niemann-Pick Disease Type C1. It also generates revenue from sales of cyclodextrin products for research and from real estate rental.

exposures.sentence: Our lead candidate is Trappsol Cyclo, which is being evaluated in clinical trials for the potential treatment of Niemann-Pick Disease Type C1 (NPC1), a rare, fatal and progressive genetic disorder.
Rafael Medical Devices, an orthopedic-focused medical device company developing instruments to advance minimally invasive surgeries.
During the year ended July 31, 2025, sales of cyclodextrin products for research purposes generates a significant portion of our revenues.
The Real Estate segment consists of a portion of a commercial building in Israel.

catalysts.event: DMC recommended to continue Phase 3 trial of Trappsol Cyclo to 96 weeks
catalysts.sentence: Based on the independent DMC review of safety and efficacy data at the prespecified 48-week interim analysis, in June 2025, the DMC recommended to continue the trial to 96 weeks.

On December 11, 2024, Rafael Medical Devices received a substantial equivalence determination for the VECTR System from the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) in response to Rafael Medical Devices 510(k) premarket notification.
